text:
I understand the undertakings that I have given, and that if I break any of my promises to the court I may be sent to prison for contempt of court.

____________________________________________

[applicant name]

____________________________________________

[respondent name]

Undertaking to facilitate obtaining an interim home pending provision of a new home

The [respondent] / [applicant] shall [use [his] / [her] best endeavours to] / [take all reasonable steps to] facilitate the obtaining of an interim new home for the use of the [applicant] / [respondent] and the child[ren] of the family until [date] / [the date of provision of the new home for the [applicant] / [respondent] and the child[ren] of the family in accordance with paragraph [para number] below and/or the date of payment of the lump sum to the [applicant] / [respondent] for the benefit of the child[ren] of the family in accordance with paragraph [number] below]. The identity of the interim new home shall be agreed between the parties or in default of agreement determined by the court.

[The [respondent] / [applicant] shall enter into an assured shorthold tenancy agreement with the landlord of the interim new home by [date], and shall pay to the landlord of the interim new home such deposit [up to the value of £[amount]] as is required to secure the interim new home] / [The [applicant] / [respondent] shall enter into an assured shorthold tenancy agreement with the landlord of the interim new home by [date], and the [respondent] / [applicant] shall pay to the landlords of the interim new home such deposit as is required to secure the interim new home].

The deposit shall remain the property of the [respondent] / [applicant] and shall be repaid to [him] / [her] when the tenancy is terminated. [The [applicant] / [respondent] shall pay to the [respondent] / [applicant] any sums deducted from the deposit by the landlord or the landlord’s agents when the tenancy is terminated.]
